title: Strongylocalyx lanceifolius
intro: There is no information available about a plant called Strongylocalyx lanceifolius.
taxonomy: Strongylocalyx lanceifolius is a type of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Cactaceae. Strongylocalyx lanceifolius is a genus of flowering plants that is native to Mexico. The classification of Strongylocalyx lanceifolius is further broken down into the order Caryophyllales. Strongylocalyx lanceifolius is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the cactus family.
